text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, when visiting the library...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Please... I beseech you!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: O-Opera O? This is a library...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! A thousand pardons. To violate<n>the library's
code of conduct is a<n>betrayal of beauty itself. As
such...<n>Ahem...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Please... I beseech you...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Um, your voice is softer this time, but...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, fine trainer. Assist me in my<n>endeavor, would
you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For she is the scholar of songs who<n>holds
knowledge of the composition I<n>seek.
Th-that phrasing is somewhat<n>perplexing...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I ask for a quick summary to get up to<n>speed.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As it turns out, T.M. Opera O has come<n>here to ask
Zenno Rob Roy for opera<n>recommendations.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She is a veritable fountain of<n>knowledge! I would
invite her<n>expertise for the benefit of my
dramaturgy!
Th-that's... You're exaggerating.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I-I simply like to read books. I'm<n>nowhere near
qualified to handle<n>such a high request.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Sim?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Eu sou linda.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huh? B-Bom, sim... você é.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Então palavras não são necessárias.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy is beyond confused. It<n>looks like I
need to step in.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There are none. When an<n>assessment is made, it
must be made<n>rightly. Am I wrong?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy, your intimate knowledge of<n>books runs
deep. You should be<n>praised for it and proud of it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Never should it be taken lightly, even<n>by yourself.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You both think so?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So, I beg of you once again—might you<n>recommend
a play worthy of one<n>such as I?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I'll pick what I consider to<n>be the finest
of works!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy comes back with two<n>scripts of
recommendation.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The one we decide to read first is...
choice_data_list: An epic about a racing deity.
The tale of a heroic savior of the people.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, what a coincidence. I have<n>been
meaning to read that very one!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Opera O and I absorb ourselves in the<n>story.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What is it thou desires?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Speed? So be it... Now, go forth.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what's come over T.M.<n>Opera O, but
it's having a positive<n>effect on her running.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, what a coincidence. I have<n>been
meaning to read that very one!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um, Opera O! I've procured another<n>book for you
today!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah! Thank you... Hehe, I can hardly<n>wait to read it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I have the urge to read more<n>heroic tales.
People yearn for heroes<n>of all shapes and sizes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... It seems the hero of her<n>dreams and I, the
Overlord, somewhat<n>differ.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Reading books seems to have helped<n>T.M. Opera
O come to a realization.
